title: stevia divaricata
intro: Stevia divaricata, also known as sweet leaf, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, belonging to the Asteraceae family and closely related to the more commonly known Stevia rebaudiana. The plant contains various compounds with medicinal properties, including steviol, stevioside, and rebaudioside, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Stevia divaricata has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, aiding in weight management, and exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used as a natural sweetener in food and beverage products.
